name: trading-discipline-workbench
description: 个人股票交易纪律、复盘和行为纠偏工作台

scripts.build:backend: python -m PyInstaller --clean --noconfirm --onefile --name trading-workbench-server --distpath dist-backend --workpath build-backend server.py
scripts.dist:mac: npm run check && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish never
scripts.dist:win: npm run check && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --win nsis zip --publish never
scripts.release:mac: npm run check && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --mac dmg zip --publish always
scripts.release:win: npm run check && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --win nsis zip --publish always
scripts.dist: npm run check && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --publish never

author: Trading Discipline Workbench
